home.heroSubtitle: We are building the future through precision craftsmanship, quality materials and a real commitment to excellence in construction — throughout Switzerland.
home.tailoredExpertiseDesc: Precision, reliability and quality craftsmanship — tailored to the specific needs of private customers in Switzerland.
home.philosophyDesc1: We treat every project with the same seriousness, regardless of scale. Specialized teams, premium materials and a direct approach — from initial consultancy to final handover.
home.philosophyDesc2: From tiles and flooring to plastering and complete construction — we are your reliable partner for every stage of construction in Switzerland.
home.contactTeam: Contact our team to discuss the project. We bring craftsmanship and precision to every building in Switzerland — no matter the size.

services.privateClientsDesc: Precision interior finishes for private customers and complete renovation projects. We offer impeccable quality.
services.aptFinishingDesc: Exterior finishes and installation of thermal facades with polystyrene or cotton wool. Services for the private and industrial sector.
services.flooringDesc: Structural, masonry and carpentry works to provide a solid and sustainable foundation for your project.

expertise.title: How we work
expertise.desc: Accuracy, reliability and architectural excellence — tailored to the specific requirements of private residences and residential complexes throughout Switzerland.
expertise.contactDiscuss: Contact our team to discuss your vision. We bring Swiss precision to every project.

services.resLead: Precise interior finishes for any type of space.
services.resBody: We offer complete interior finishing services, ideal for private customers and for construction sites that require complete renovations.
services.intLead: Premium facades and high quality external insulation.
services.intBody: We perform exterior finishes and thermal facades, which we perform both for private customers and in the industrial sector.
services.floorLead: The solid foundation of your construction.
services.floorBody: Our structure teams provide strength work essential to the sustainability of any building.

steps.title: Consultancy
steps.desc: We start with a thorough discussion to understand the vision, requirements, budget and deadlines.

steps.title: Planning
steps.desc: Our team develops complete plans, providing full transparency on materials and costs.

steps.title: Approvals
steps.desc: We take care of all the necessary permits, having extensive experience with the Swiss construction law.

steps.title: Execution
steps.desc: Precision execution by our teams with rigorous quality control.

steps.title: Predare
steps.desc: Final inspection, complete documentation and handover — with warranty in writing.

portfolio.title: OUR WORKS
portfolio.desc: A selection of completed projects — home construction, apartment design, professionally executed finishes and floors.

company.title: About ArcoBau
company.desc: A Swiss company dedicated to quality residential construction, interior finishing and flooring.

cards.heritageDesc: Based on Swiss quality, ArcoBau brings meticulous attention to every project in Switzerland.
cards.missionDesc: We are building the future. Our mission is to provide high quality services to customers all over Switzerland.
cards.valuesDesc: Quality, reliability and transparency form our core. We offer clear pricing and explain every step.

values.teamsDesc: We don't subcontract. We have our masonry, tile, parquet, drywall and plumbing teams.
values.guaranteeDesc: We provide a written warranty for the works. If there's an issue, we'll come back and fix it at no additional cost.
values.punctualityDesc: We set realistic deadlines and meet them. We communicate proactively about the status of the works.
values.materialsDesc: We use materials from verified European and Swiss suppliers, totally transparent in price.

timeline.event: Beginnings – first finishing projects and gaining international experience
Expanding teams and tackling first full construction projects
Developing partnerships with premium material suppliers at European level
Over 100 successfully completed projects for a diverse range of clients
Extensive experience in the market, with hundreds of projects delivered and teams of international professionals

company.commitmentDesc: Each project confirms our commitment. From consulting to completion, ArcoBau offers transparency and professional integrity — Swiss style.

contact.title: Start Project
contact.desc: We'd love to hear about your plans. Fill out the form below and a specialist will get back to you quickly.

form.successDesc: Thank you for your message. We'll get back to you within 1 business day.
form.title: Request quote
form.messagePlaceholder: Describe your project vision, location, desired term…
form.privacyMsg: By submitting, you agree to the Privacy Policy.
